root_cause: Tag resolution failed with HTTP 403 authorization_failed on GET /locations/:locationId/tags before payload construction and POST /contacts/upsert.
recommended_repair_scope: Confirm the existing GHL Private Integration has location-tag read/create and contact-write permissions.
Regenerate or rotate the existing private integration token because current direct contact readback returns HTTP 401.
Update only GHL_PRIVATE_INTEGRATION_TOKEN in Vercel Production without printing it.
Redeploy Production if the Vercel token value changes, then read back the existing email without creating or upserting a contact.
unresolved_questions: Whether an independently existing contact record matches the email; current read-only contact search returned HTTP 401.
Whether the configured contact.* static custom-field keys are accepted by GHL; the event failed during tag lookup before upsert.
The sanitized GHL error body/code for the event-time 403; current logging retains only status and classification.
Whether tag creation permission would succeed if either required tag were absent.
